tasks.name: Repo & CI readiness (pytest + node test/eslint harness, ci-gate)
tasks.description: Establish the testing contract every other task must satisfy: a Python pytest harness for sources/bot with a conftest that mocks Supabase + Slack (no network), a Node test/lint harness for sources/dashboard, and .github/workflows/ci.yml (ci-gate) that runs both.

tasks.name: Data model: validate migration vs scratch DB + data-layer shims
tasks.description: Validate db/001_phase0_migration.sql against a local scratch Postgres in CI and add data-layer shims for the new columns/table in sources/bot and sources/dashboard. NO prod writes.

tasks.name: ITEM#1 5–6 digit lead IDs (RND-169)
tasks.description: Accept 5–6 digit lead IDs; reject other lengths / non-numeric.

tasks.name: ITEM#2 dedupe by id_lead + reopen (RND-170)
tasks.description: Dedupe on id_lead: append timestamped note to existing request instead of new; reopen Resolved/Completed → In Progress; write request_history.

tasks.name: ITEM#3 files/images → Supabase Storage (RND-171)
tasks.description: Download Slack files, upload to mercury-attachments bucket, record into requests.attachments; thread-reply / ask-for-id logic; new 'file #N' command.

tasks.name: ITEM#4 standalone notes (RND-172)
tasks.description: Decouple note from status change; note-by-id command available to submitters too.

tasks.name: ITEM#5 history writes + @help history #N (RND-173)
tasks.description: Write request_history on every claim/assign/status/note/type/reopen; new '@help history #N' command.

tasks.name: ITEM#6-display request_type in bot output (RND-174)
tasks.description: Bot DISPLAYS request_type in status/detail output (dashboard-only to set).

tasks.name: ITEM#8 Performance API (RND-176)
tasks.description: Per-user status counts + resolved-today + resolved-this-week + Unassigned aggregate; role-scoped.

tasks.name: ITEM#9 roles + access-filtering API (RND-177)
tasks.description: retention/supervisor/admin model; server-side self-scoping for retention; mercury_users-driven allowlist; assign restricted to supervisor/admin.

tasks.name: ITEM#11 detail lead-join + history API (RND-179)
tasks.description: Join id_lead → rep_logs/leads returning the full @info field set + the request_history; clean not-found marker; office from the lead lookup.

tasks.name: ITEM#12 filters API (RND-180)
tasks.description: /requests accepts submitter/office/assigned_to/status/request_type/date + lead attrs + free-text lead search; filters AND-combine.

tasks.name: Dashboard frontend A: type dropdown, notes/assign perms, detail panel (RND-174/178/172/179)
tasks.description: queue.html + js/requests.js: type dropdown (#6), note-anyone / assign-supervisor-only (#10/#4), detail panel reusing @info layout for lead+history+attachments (#11).

tasks.name: Dashboard frontend B: Performance tab + role-gated tabs (RND-176/177)
tasks.description: performance.html + js/performance.js: per-user cards + Unassigned card (#8); tab gating by role (#9/#16) driven by mercury_users; bump ?v=.

tasks.name: Refresh @help help listing (role-aware capstone) (RND-183)
tasks.description: Rewrite hardcoded @help help text: history #N, file #N, submitter note #N; role-gated. Text-only; runs last.
